title: Help-Seeking: Knowing When and How to Get Support
titleAr: طلب المساعدة: معرفة متى وكيف تحصل على الدعم
learningObjective: After this exercise, the user will know the help-seeking pathway (self-care → peer support → professional help) and identify local Egyptian resources.
learningObjectiveAr: بعد هذا التمرين، سيعرف المستخدم مسار طلب المساعدة ويحدد الموارد المصرية المحلية.

content.scenario:
Help-seeking is not all-or-nothing. There is a PATHWAY (Health Belief Model, Rosenstock, 1974):

**Level 1: Self-Care** — Wellbeing practices, PERMA activities, stress management
**Level 2: Peer/Family Support** — Talking to trusted friends, family, or mentors
**Level 3: Community Support** — University counseling, support groups, helplines
**Level 4: Professional Help** — Psychologist, psychiatrist, clinical social worker
**Level 5: Crisis Intervention** — Emergency services, crisis hotlines

🇪🇬 Egyptian Resources:
- GSMHAT Crisis Line: **16328**
- Dar al-Ifta Helpline: **107**
- University counseling centers (varies by university)
content.scenarioAr: طلب المساعدة ليس نعم أو لا. هناك مسار.

task.instructions: For each scenario, identify the appropriate help-seeking level.
task.instructionsAr: لكل سيناريو، حدد مستوى طلب المساعدة المناسب.

items.text: Feeling stressed about exams → Level 1 (Self-Care) or Level 2 (Peer Support)
items.explanation: Exam stress is normal. Self-care practices (exercise, sleep, breaks) and talking to friends are appropriate first responses.

items.text: Persistent low mood for 3+ weeks affecting daily function → Level 3 or 4 (Community or Professional Help)
items.explanation: Duration (3+ weeks) and functional impairment suggest professional consultation would be beneficial. University counseling is a good starting point.

items.text: A friend expresses thoughts of self-harm → Level 5 (Crisis Intervention: 16328)
items.explanation: Self-harm thoughts require immediate professional support. Stay with the person, listen without judgment, and help them contact the crisis line: 16328.

feedback.correct: Excellent! You now know the help-seeking pathway. Remember: seeking help early, at any level, is a sign of strength, not weakness.
feedback.correctAr: ممتاز! تعرف الآن مسار طلب المساعدة.
feedback.incorrect: Review the levels. The key is matching the severity and duration of the issue to the appropriate level of support.

whatNotToDo: Don't wait until crisis to seek help — early intervention is more effective
Don't try to be someone's therapist — your role is to listen and help connect them to resources
evidence: Rosenstock, I.M. (1974). Health Belief Model. Health Education Monographs, 2(4), 328-335.
safetyNote: If you or someone you know needs immediate help: Egypt crisis line 16328.
com_b_mechanism: Help-seeking pathway knowledge builds capability to navigate support systems
